content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

No actionable correctness, safety, or robustness findings in the reviewed diff. I inspected the milestone-bundle contract/prompt/renderer changes in src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs, src/contexts/requirements_drafting/contracts.rs, and src/contexts/workspace_governance/template_catalog.rs, along with the related handoff/materialization call sites and updated tests. Targeted cargo test filters covering milestone bundle contract validation, dependency-graph/workstream-order helpers, markdown rendering, and legacy covered_by backfill passed. Residual risk is limited to broader end-to-end planner behavior and repo-wide verification, since I did not run full cargo clippy/fmt or nix build in this review pass.

## Amendments

None.
